/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fire_player.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fire_player.dir/src/FireFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fire_player.dir/src/FireRuntime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fire_player.dir/src/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fire_player.dir/src/ShaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fire_player.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o fire_player  libimgui.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so -lX11 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
